notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Justin Foscue. Nico Hoerner to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dansby Swanson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to second baseman Justin Foscue to first baseman Jake Burger. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 2nd. Dansby Swanson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen walks. Evan Carter to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue singles on a line drive to left fielder Ian Happ. Evan Carter scores. Andrew McCutchen to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, second baseman Nico Hoerner to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.
